faqs.question: Why do I have crickets in my Manhattanville apartment?
faqs.answer: Crickets are attracted to moisture, warmth, and food sources commonly found in Manhattanville buildings. Older structures with basement moisture issues, cracks in foundations, and gaps around windows provide easy entry points. They're especially common near Riverside Park and in buildings with damp basements or laundry areas.
